mapper.insert:
SELECT SETTLEMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SETTLEMENTS ( SETTLEMENT_ID, EXPENSE_ID, GROUP_ID, TITLE, TOTAL_AMOUNT, TOTAL_PENALTY_AMOUNT, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{settlementId}, #{expenseId}, #{groupId}, #{title}, #{totalAmount}, 0, 'PROCEEDING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT s.SETTLEMENT_ID AS settlementId, s.EXPENSE_ID AS expenseId, s.GROUP_ID AS groupId, s.TITLE AS title, s.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, s.TOTAL_PENALTY_AMOUNT AS totalPenaltyAmount, s.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(s.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, COUNT(d.DETAIL_ID) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN d.STATUS = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paidCount FROM SETTLEMENTS s LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_DETAILS d ON s.SETTLEMENT_ID = d.SETTLEMENT_ID WHERE s.GROUP_ID = #{groupId} GROUP BY s.SETTLEMENT_ID, s.EXPENSE_ID, s.GROUP_ID, s.TITLE, s.TOTAL_AMOUNT, s.TOTAL_PENALTY_AMOUNT, s.STATUS, s.CREATED_AT ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.STATUS = 'PROCEEDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT d.DETAIL_ID AS detailId, d.SETTLEMENT_ID AS settlementId, d.USER_ID AS userId, u.NICKNAME AS userName, u.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImg, d.AMOUNT_DUE AS amountDue, d.PENALTY_AMOUNT AS penaltyAmount, d.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(d.PAID_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS paidAt, TO_CHAR(d.UPDATED_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM SETTLEMENT_DETAILS d JOIN USERS u ON d.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE d.SETTLEMENT_ID = #{settlementId} ORDER BY d.STATUS ASC, u.NICKNAME ASC

SELECT d.DETAIL_ID AS detailId, d.SETTLEMENT_ID AS settlementId, d.USER_ID AS userId, d.AMOUNT_DUE AS amountDue, d.PENALTY_AMOUNT AS penaltyAmount, d.STATUS AS status, s.TITLE AS settlementTitle, s.GROUP_ID AS groupId FROM SETTLEMENT_DETAILS d JOIN SETTLEMENTS s ON d.SETTLEMENT_ID = s.SETTLEMENT_ID WHERE d.USER_ID = #{userId} AND d.STATUS = 'WAITING' AND s.STATUS = 'PROCEEDING' ORDER BY s.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE SETTLEMENT_DETAILS SET STATUS = 'PAID', PAID_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}
